meta.title: Cleaning company in Marseille — about us
meta.description: MB Nettoyage, a cleaning company in Marseille: home cleaning and professional cleaning, using natural products and equipment.

paragraphes: MB Nettoyage is a cleaning company based in Marseille, founded by Meriem Bouhofrat. It works with individuals and businesses alike: home cleaning, ironing and windows on one side, office, shop upkeep and post-construction cleaning on the other.

Every visit is carried out with natural products and equipment, respecting your home, your furniture and your habits. The goal is simple: a careful, lasting result, without compromising on the quality of the products used.

MB Nettoyage covers Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and a 20 km radius, available 24/7 to fit your schedule. A complementary range of cleaning products is in preparation, to extend this commitment to quality beyond each visit.

content.titre: Everything to know before getting started

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.reponse: For individuals: regular or one-off cleaning, deep cleaning, move-out cleaning, ironing and window cleaning. For businesses: office and shop upkeep, window cleaning and post-construction cleaning.

items.question: What area do you cover?
items.reponse: Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and roughly 20 km around these two towns.

items.question: How do I get a quote?
items.reponse: By phone, WhatsApp or our form: the quote is free and with no obligation, we reply quickly, 7 days a week.

items.question: Do I need to provide any products or equipment?
items.reponse: No, nothing to prepare: we arrive fully equipped, with natural products chosen for the surfaces to treat.

items.question: Do your services qualify for the tax credit?
items.reponse: Yes, for cleaning, ironing and windows carried out at an individual's home: 50% of the amount is refunded or deducted from your taxes. Services for businesses are billed on quote, and are not eligible.

items.question: Do you offer a discount for a first appointment?
items.reponse: Yes, −15% applies to your first visit. A referral offer also gives you −€10, as well as the person you refer.

items.question: Are you available on weekends?
items.reponse: Yes, MB Nettoyage is available 24/7, to fit your schedule.

meta.title: Cleaning service area — Marseille and Aix

content.intro: Based on boulevard de Saint-Loup, in the 11th arrondissement, we cover Marseille, the Aix area and the towns around the Étang de Berre — for private homes and business premises alike.
Two areas, one team: the list below is the reference, and if your town isn't on it, give us a call — within a few kilometres, we can often work something out.

paragraphes: Aix-en-Provence is not just an extension of our map: we provide the same services there as in Marseille — regular or one-off cleaning, ironing and windows for individuals, office and shop upkeep for businesses.
Prices don't change from one town to the other: €50/h for regular cleaning, €60/h for a one-off, and always the 50% tax credit for services carried out at your home.
Around Aix, we cover Gardanne, Bouc-Bel-Air, Cabriès, Simiane-Collongue, Éguilles and Venelles. Not sure about your town? One call is enough to confirm we travel there.

meta.title: 50% tax credit — home cleaning in Marseille
meta.description: MB Nettoyage's cleaning, ironing and window services carried out at an individual's home in Marseille are eligible for the 50% tax credit.

content.intro: Cleaning, ironing and window cleaning carried out at your home are eligible for the 50% tax credit under home care services rules.

content.argumentaire: For regular cleaning at home: €50/h billed, but only €25/h actually paid by you after the 50% tax credit.
points: 50% tax credit on home cleaning, ironing and windows
A tax certificate is issued to you every year
Only valid for services carried out at an individual's home
content.cardIntro: Estimate your real cost in a few seconds, tax credit deducted.
content.note: Indicative estimate, within the annual cap set by the tax administration for home care services.

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning, ironing and windows carried out at your home, you receive a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid, under home care services rules.

items.question: Does this apply to services for businesses?
items.reponse: No. The tax credit only applies to services carried out at an individual's home. Office, shop and post-construction cleaning are billed on quote, without tax credit.

items.question: What do I need to do to benefit from it?
items.reponse: Nothing in particular: a certificate summarising the amounts paid is issued to you every year, to include in your tax return.

items.question: Is there a cap?
items.reponse: Yes, the tax credit applies within the annual caps set by the tax administration for home care services.

content.titre: Take advantage of the tax credit on your home cleaning
content.sousTitre: Free quote by phone, quick reply.

content.intro: MB Nettoyage takes care of your home in Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and beyond: floors, bathrooms, kitchen and dusting, with natural products and equipment.

content.titre: A precise routine, from ceiling to tiles
paragraphes: In practice, every visit follows the same logic: we air the rooms, dust from top to bottom, scrub the kitchen and bathrooms, then finish with the floors. Everything is included in the hourly rate — €50/h for regular visits, €60/h for a one-off — with equipment and natural products brought by us, at no extra charge.

Need more than routine upkeep? A full top-to-bottom refresh before a rental or a move falls under deep cleaning, priced separately on quote. Windows simply get added to the same visit, at €10 to €15 per window depending on size.

Our base is at 171 boulevard de Saint-Loup, in Marseille's 11th arrondissement: from there we cover all of Marseille, plus Allauch, Plan-de-Cuques, Marignane, Vitrolles and the Aix area — Gardanne, Bouc-Bel-Air, Cabriès. And since half the bill comes back as a tax credit, your regular cleaning hour really costs you €25.

items.texte: You describe your home and the frequency you want. Free quote by phone.
We set a regular or one-off time, fitting your schedule.
We carry out the cleaning with care, natural products and equipment supplied.

content.titre: Service in Marseille, Aix-en-Provence and 20 km around

items.question: What's the difference between regular and one-off cleaning?
items.reponse: Regular cleaning (€50/h) is recurring upkeep at a fixed frequency. One-off cleaning (€60/h) is a single visit, with no commitment.

items.question: Do I need to supply the equipment and products?
items.reponse: No, we bring our own equipment and natural products, suited to your home.

items.question: Does home cleaning qualify for the tax credit?

content.eyebrow: Before or after a move-out inspection
content.titre: Deep cleaning & move-out cleaning in Marseille
content.intro: Moving in, tenants moving out, or a final inspection: MB Nettoyage restores your home in Marseille and beyond, with a free quote by phone.

items.description: Floors, bathrooms, kitchen and storage thoroughly treated.
Fitting your move-out inspection or key handover deadlines.
Natural products and equipment suited to every type of home.
A clean home, ready to live in or hand back without reservation.

content.titre: Hand back the keys with peace of mind
paragraphes: A move-out inspection often comes down to details: marks on the skirting boards, limescale in the bathroom, a forgotten oven. Our deep cleaning goes through the home room by room — floors, bathrooms, kitchen, storage, high-up dust — to leave it in a condition nobody can argue with.

It works the other way round too: before moving in, having the flat properly cleaned means you don't inherit the previous occupants' marks. The quote is prepared free of charge by phone, based on the surface area and condition of the home, and we work around your key handover date.

A landlord between two tenants or a family mid-move: the need is the same in Marseille, Allauch, Marignane or over towards Aix, Gardanne and Bouc-Bel-Air. Carried out at an individual's home, this deep clean may also qualify for the 50% tax credit — your quote will spell it out.

content.titre: Your questions before handing back the keys

items.question: How is the quote prepared?
items.reponse: Free of charge, by phone, based on the surface area and condition of the home.

items.question: Do you work before moving in or after moving out?
items.reponse: Yes, in both cases, as well as before a final move-out inspection.

items.question: Does deep cleaning qualify for the tax credit?
items.reponse: Deep cleaning and move-out cleaning carried out at an individual's home may be eligible: the quote will clarify the conditions for your situation.

meta.title: Home ironing in Marseille — from €10/kilo

service.name: Home ironing
service.description: Laundry ironing at home, by the kilo, in Marseille and beyond.

content.intro: Your laundry sorted, ironed and folded with care, from €10/kilo, with a reduced rate from 3 kilos.

items.description: Reduced rate from 3 kilos.

content.note: Home service, eligible for the 50% tax credit.

content.titre: From the basket to the wardrobe, folded and put away
paragraphes: The principle is simple: your laundry is weighed, sorted by fabric, ironed piece by piece and then folded, ready to put away. All at your home, at €10 per kilo, with a rate that drops from 3 kilos — no need to wait for a mountain of shirts before calling us.

Sheets, shirts, delicate fabrics: each material gets the right setting, and your laundry goes back folded the way you store it, not the way we do. It's a service in its own right, not an afterthought rushed at the end of a cleaning visit.

Many of our Marseille clients actually combine ironing and cleaning in the same slot: one visit, one invoice, and the whole thing stays eligible for the 50% tax credit since it all happens at your home. We travel across Marseille as well as Allauch, Plan-de-Cuques, Marignane and Vitrolles. The quote is done by phone or WhatsApp, free of charge — just the time to weigh the basket, and you know exactly where you stand.

items.description: Every piece is ironed and folded with attention, according to fabric.
From 3 kilos, the price per kilo goes down.
Reachable at any time to organise your ironing.

content.titre: Your questions about ironing by the kilo

items.question: How is the ironing price calculated?
items.reponse: By the weight of the laundry, at €10/kilo, with a reduced rate from 3 kilos.

items.question: Can ironing be combined with cleaning?
items.reponse: Yes, cleaning and ironing can be combined during the same visit.

content.titre: Clean windows, street side and courtyard side
paragraphes: Between the mistral wind, dust and rain splashes, Marseille windows get dirty fast. We wash them inside and out, frames included, with natural products that leave neither streaks nor harsh smells. Expect €10 to €15 per window depending on size — the price is announced before the visit, not after.

For individuals, the service slots easily into a regular cleaning visit and qualifies for the 50% tax credit. For businesses — shopfronts, glass office façades — the quote is tailor-made, at the frequency of your choice, including outside your opening hours.

We cover Marseille and its neighbouring towns, from Allauch to Vitrolles, as well as the Aix-en-Provence area. For a shopfront in the city centre or a villa with bay windows, the principle stays the same: a price announced upfront and a careful visit, with no commitment.
